risk_reason: ASE's extensive manufacturing footprint includes multiple facilities in China (Shanghai, Wuxi, Suzhou, Kunshan, Huizhou), creating geopolitical and trade-restriction concentration risk for chip module supply.

ATI has expanded titanium production capacity (new Pageland, SC facility, 12,500-ton billet press) and secured long-term agreements with Boeing and Airbus, positively reinforcing supply continuity for titanium buyers.
